one_line_thesis: Normalized owner cash at $248.64 implies ~20% annual return; personal-lines compounder with peak-cycle earnings risk; hold on math, validate $30/sh normalization.

deep_dive.executive_summary: At about $248.64 per share, our base case implies 19.82% per year over seven years on normalized owner cash of $30.00 per share, above the ~15% threshold. Allstate is the third-largest U.S. personal P&C insurer with improving underwriting discipline, a scaled investment portfolio, and active capital return ($1.24 billion of buybacks in 2025, $1.06 billion of common dividends). FY2025 Property-Liability underwriting income was $8.54 billion on a 85.2% combined ratio; Q1 2026 net income was $2.46 billion ($9.25 diluted EPS per share) versus $596 million ($2.11) in Q1 2025 (`ALL/investor-docum...

decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: High-return compounder
applicability_tests: Owner earnings can be separated from stock compensation, working capital, and maintenance capital.
Incremental returns on retained capital are observable and durable.
The competitive advantage explains pricing, retention, share, or cost outcomes.
Terminal value is supported by a reinvestment runway rather than an unexplained multiple.
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: A complete security value is intentionally withheld while material components are unpriced. Attribution restarts after the first proof-complete baseline.

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

valuation_decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

timeline.label: Leadership / governance risk elevated. How Investors May Respond To Allstate (ALL) Catastrophe Losses And New CFO Appointment - simplywall.st; CoStar CFO heads to Allstate with $2M sign-on bonus - Yahoo Finance
Net income moved +120.3% versus the prior period (4,667.0 to 10,282.0).
Q1 2026 net income $2.46B ($9.25 diluted EPS) versus $596M ($2.11) in Q1 2025; continued strong underwriting
FY2025 10-K: combined ratio 85.2%, underwriting income $8.54B, book value $108.45/sh, ROE 42.3%
Board authorized new $4.0B share repurchase program after completion of $1.5B program; 2025 repurchases $1.24B (6M shares)
Transformative Growth strategy: multi-channel distribution (exclusive, independent, direct) to grow personal-lines share at lower expense ratio
FY2024 combined ratio improved to 94.3% from 104.5% in 2023 as rate actions took hold
FY2023 underwriting loss year: combined ratio 104.5% amid auto/home loss inflation
National General integration continues under Allstate Protection multi-brand distribution
Protection Services expanded (roadside, protection plans, Arity telematics) beyond core P&C underwriting

industry.structure: U.S. personal auto and homeowners insurance is concentrated among a handful of national carriers (State Farm, Progressive, Allstate, GEICO) with high marketing intensity and state-by-state rate regulation.
industry.share_shift: Direct-channel insurers gained auto share in the 2010s; incumbents with multi-channel models (Allstate, Progressive) are reinvesting in pricing sophistication and expense cuts to defend share.
industry.trend: 2022-2024 loss inflation forced industry-wide rate increases; 2025-2026 focus shifts to profit retention, catastrophe reinsurance costs, and telematics-based underwriting (Arity).

risk_claims.claim: Leadership / governance risk elevated. How Investors May Respond To Allstate (ALL) Catastrophe Losses And New CFO Appointment - simplywall.st; CoStar CFO heads to Allstate with $2M sign-on bonus - Yahoo Finance
*Primary risk: Catastrophe losses and social inflation push the combined ratio back above 100%, wiping out underwriting income while the stock still prices mid-cycle earnings power.
Cycle reversal: FY2025 85.2% combined ratio includes 3.1 points of favorable reserve releases; normalized profitability is lower.
